title: MCP-Atlas Task Claims
description: Schema for the GTFA_CLAIMS field in public_split.csv. Each task has a list of atomic factual claims that any correct answer must contain.

items.description: A single atomic claim phrased as an affirmative declarative sentence. Must be independently verifiable from tool outputs. Example: 'Lamine Yamal was born in 2007.'

per_claim_levels.1.0: Fully and unambiguously supported by the agent's final answer
per_claim_levels.0.5: Partially supported, or supported with minor error
